queries.question: Display podcasts and radio shows with hosts with 10 years of experience.
queries.sql:
SELECT Shows.title 
FROM Shows JOIN Podcasters ON Shows.host = Podcasters.name
WHERE (Shows.audio_format = 'Podcast' OR Shows.audio_format = 'Radio Show') AND Podcasters.years_experience = 10
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?shows a :Show .
  ?podcasters a :Podcasters .
  ?shows p:host ?host_l .
  ?podcasters p:name ?name_r .
  ?shows p:title ?title .
  ?shows p:audio_format ?audio_format_w .
  ?shows p:audio_format ?audio_format_w2 .
  ?podcasters p:years_experience ?years_experience_w .
  FILTER(STR(?host_l) = STR(?name_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?audio_format_w) = "Podcast" || STR(?audio_format_w2) = "Radio Show")) && (STR(?years_experience_w) = "10" || STR(?years_experience_w) = "10.0")))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Display podcasts and radio shows with hosts with 10 years of experience.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?shows a :Show .
  ?podcasters a :Podcasters .
  ?shows p:host ?host_l .
  ?podcasters p:name ?name_r .
  ?shows p:title ?title .
  ?shows p:audio_format ?audio_format_w .
  ?shows p:audio_format ?audio_format_w2 .
  ?podcasters p:years_experience ?years_experience_w .
  FILTER(STR(?host_l) = STR(?name_r))
  FILTER((STR(?audio_format_w) = "Podcast" || (STR(?audio_format_w2) = "Radio Show" && (STR(?years_experience_w) = "10" || STR(?years_experience_w) = "10.0"))))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?shows a :Show .
  ?podcasters a :Podcasters .
  ?shows p:host ?host_l .
  ?podcasters p:name ?name_r .
  ?shows p:title ?title .
  ?shows p:audio_format ?audio_format_w .
  ?shows p:audio_format ?audio_format_w2 .
  ?podcasters p:years_experience ?years_experience_w .
  FILTER(STR(?host_l) = STR(?name_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?audio_format_w) = "Podcast" || STR(?audio_format_w2) = "Radio Show")) && (STR(?years_experience_w) = "10" || STR(?years_experience_w) = "10.0")))
} }
}
